Turns a non-mechanical unit ethereal and slows its movement speed by <A0WY,DataA1,%>% for <A0WY,Dur1> (3 for Heroes) seconds. Ethereal creatures cannot attack, but they can cast spells and certain spells cast upon them will have a greater effect.

Turns a non-mechanical unit ethereal and slows its movement speed by <A0WY,DataA2,%>% for <A0WY,Dur2> (5 for Heroes) seconds. Ethereal creatures cannot attack, but they can cast spells and certain spells cast upon them will have a greater effect.
